mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plan_training_day WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY day_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_training_day (plan_id, day_order, day_type, training_type, carb_multiplier, protein_multiplier, fat_multiplier) VALUES (#{planId}, #{dayOrder}, #{dayType}, #{trainingType}, #{carbMultiplier}, #{proteinMultiplier}, #{fatMultiplier})

INSERT INTO plan_training_day (plan_id, day_order, day_type, training_type, carb_multiplier, protein_multiplier, fat_multiplier) VALUES
(#{item.planId}, #{item.dayOrder}, #{item.dayType}, #{item.trainingType}, #{item.carbMultiplier}, #{item.proteinMultiplier}, #{item.fatMultiplier})
